rationale.R1.1: Identifies conceptual issues and proposes tighter framing, partially supported.
rationale.R1.4: Flags one missing citation but does not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: Audits some citations but not all load-bearing ones.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims but not all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in original.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major rewrites but not minor edits.
